name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Frisco, TX – Visit TitleMax Title Loans at 8445 Preston Rd for fast title loans and cash advances, open Mon-Sat.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans stands at 8445 Preston Rd in Frisco, TX, conveniently located in this growing Dallas-area suburb. The storefront offers a straightforward walk-in experience for residents of Frisco seeking quick financial solutions. Hours are Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, Saturday 10 AM to 4 PM, and closed Sundays.

At this Frisco location on Preston Rd, you can apply for title loans, cash advances, and other fast lending options. Call +1 469-208-1565 to speak with staff at the Frisco, TX branch, or visit in person to complete your application quickly. TitleMax is designed to provide fast approval and funding for eligible borrowers.

If you're a Frisco resident needing emergency cash, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and your vehicle title. The application process is designed to be quick, with same-day funding available in many cases. TitleMax has served thousands of customers across Texas with transparent terms and competitive rates.
pros: Same-day cash approval and funding for title pledges
Keep driving your vehicle while using it as loan collateral
Extended hours including Friday evenings (until 7pm) and Saturday service
Bilingual services available at this location
Accepts most credit types; credit score not primary qualification
Exceptional customer service ratings (5.0/5 average across 481 Google reviews)
Dual product offerings (secured title pledges + unsecured lines of credit) at single location
cons: Title pledges are high-cost emergency loans with significantly higher interest rates than traditional lending
Unsecured line of credit unavailable online for Tennessee residents despite in-store availability
Requires clear vehicle title for pledges, limiting access for those with outstanding loans on vehicles
Products are designed for short-term emergencies, not long-term financial solutions
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash (same-day) for unexpected emergencies without access to traditional credit
Vehicle owners with fair or poor credit who need collateral-based loans while maintaining transportation
Memphis-area residents seeking bilingual financial services with extended business hours
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for Memphis-area residents or multi-state customers facing immediate cash needs who have vehicle collateral and limited traditional credit access. The critical caveat is that title pledge loans carry substantially higher costs than standard lending—these should be used only for genuine emergencies, not routine financial needs, and customers should explore payday alternatives or credit union PALs before pursuing title pledges.
services: Flex line of credit (unsecured, flexible withdrawal)
Payment customization (lump sum or flexible repayment)
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at 8445 Preston Rd, Frisco, TX. Fast title loans with same-day funding for Frisco residents.
